blog_title: Girls Summer Hoodie Business India — ₹0 to ₹5 Lakh Plan for Lightweight Pastel Hoodies in Bulk
caption:
“Summer mein hoodie kaun kharidega?” — completely wrong.

Girls summer hoodies (140–160 GSM, pastel shades) sell in bulk across India’s Tier 2 cities March through August. College girls, creators, aesthetic brands — all restocking quarterly.

We mapped the GSM picks, DTF printing margins, and a real ₹0 to ₹5 lakh batch plan. Specific numbers, no fluff.
